phoneticUs: 藢忙d蕭蓹藞re瑟t蓹m; 藢忙d蕭蓹r藞e瑟t蓹m; 蓹藞d蕭er蓹t蓹m
examples: Objective:To observe the effects of Ageratum-liquid on motility of rats.
Any of several other plants having flower clusters similar to the ageratum.
The development of allelochemical of Ageratum conyzoides L. on insects was summarized in this paper.
